commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=edcf501ba4dda612a1c6475e265969f37964f208)
commands.review_summary:
The branch defaults missing memory public-artifact `agentIds` to an empty array in the memory state and memory-wiki bridge paths, and also adds comparator fallbacks for other artifact fields.

PR surface: Source +2. Total +2 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main and `v2026.6.6` directly spread and join `artifact.agentIds`, and the linked report gives a concrete OpenClaw 2026.6.5 Windows wiki-tool failure when that runtime field is omitted. I did not run a live affected workspace in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Human maintainer review is needed to choose the canonical duplicate branch and accept the host-side compatibility fallback; contributor-owned real behavior proof is still a merge gate.

target.title: #92207 fix(memory-wiki): guard against missing agentIds in public artifacts
target.body:
## Summary

Fix two null-safety issues in `memory-wiki` bridge and `memory-state` sorted artifact listing where `MemoryPluginPublicArtifact.agentIds` could be `undefined` at runtime despite being typed as `string[]`.

**Root cause:** `agentIds` is typed as `string[]` (required) in `MemoryPluginPublicArtifact` but certain plugin implementations may not populate this field, resulting in `undefined`. Two call sites assumed the field was always present, causing runtime errors.

**Fix 1 — `extensions/memory-wiki/src/bridge.ts`:** Line 239 passes `artifact.agentIds ?? []` instead of raw `artifact.agentIds` to `agentIdsByWorkspace.set()`.

**Fix 2 — `src/plugins/memory-state.ts`:** The sort comparator in `listActiveMemoryPublicArtifacts()` guards all 6 property chains with `?? ""` / `?? []` fallbacks, and `cloneMemoryPublicArtifact()` uses `[...(artifact.agentIds ?? [])]` to handle undefined during the spread.

## Test plan

- [x] `pnpm test -- --run 'src/plugins/memory-state'` — passes
- [x] `pnpm test -- --run 'extensions/memory-wiki'` — passes
- [x] `pnpm typecheck` — passes
- [x] Manual verification: undefined agentIds is now safely handled at both call sites
target.author: pandah97

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge

commands.author: Pandah97
